{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = The Territory
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Otoku]] was banished back to the [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
